title: 2026-06-20 Kuala Lumpur Cempaka Saturday Snapshots
summary: Kuala Lumpur Saturday set using cempaka yellow across work, date, club, and home-life snapshots, with concrete city spaces and partial lived-moment compositions.
summaryJa: 各地のアルバム。色の軸はチェンパカイエロー。構成は仕事場、飲食店、音楽の場、室内。

images.alt: Adult late-20s Kuala Lumpur Zhongshan Building creative studio work snapshot with sleeveless ivory linen waistcoat, cempaka-yellow satin belt scarf, cropped barrel trousers, sheer ankle socks, slingback pumps, and fabric-board gesture
images.title: 01 Office Zhongshan fabric board

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Kuala Lumpur Kwai Chai Hong evening dessert look with cropped cream camp-collar shirt, black pleated mini skort with tailored shorts, sheer ankle socks, Mary Jane flats, and cempaka-yellow bag scarf
images.title: 02 Date Kwai Chai Hong flower skort

images.alt: Adult early-20s Kuala Lumpur REXKL music-night partial snapshot with black mesh-over-opaque one-shoulder top, glossy cempaka-yellow short wrap skirt over black fitted shorts, patterned tights, perforated summer ankle boots, and chrome crossbody
images.title: 03 Club REXKL boot adjust

images.alt: Adult early-20s Kuala Lumpur high-rise monsoon laundry snapshot with black ribbed scoop-neck tank, pale-gray linen half pants, cempaka-yellow mesh overshirt drying on a rack, ribbed socks, and black house sandals
images.title: 04 Home monsoon laundry
